description: This pipeline extracts pairwise statistics between 3D ROIs. The main steps involve measuring the statistics of two sets of ROIs and calculating the pairwise statistics.

981efe86-1d95-46da-b77e-f0bc8df5b387.name: ij3d-measure-pairwise-roi3d
981efe86-1d95-46da-b77e-f0bc8df5b387.description:
Extracts all pairwise statistics between the 3D ROI

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
